content.rule: No work reaches the owner without going through peer review. Review is done by another instance of the same Manager in review mode, with isolated context and adversarial posture, fired automatically via sub-invocation.
content.why: Self-QA and peer review catch different things. Self-QA catches what the author can see. Peer review catches confirmation bias, shortcuts, dead code, wrong callsite, regressions, ignored edge cases. Human cost makes peer review expensive in human teams — in AI, the cost is seconds and tokens.
how_to_apply: Standard flow: specialist executes → self-QA → reports to Manager → Manager reviews (natural peer review as tech lead) → approves or rejects → synthesizes for Leo

When Manager executes directly: Manager fires sub-invocation of themselves in review mode via Task tool. New instance receives changed files/diff + self-QA output + adversarial context WITHOUT the execution session's reasoning
Context isolation is mandatory: reviewer cannot see the original session's context. If it does, confirmation bias returns. Invoke sub-session with fresh prompt containing only artifacts
If reviewer rejects: back to executing agent with specific comments → fix → re-submit → new review. If loop exceeds 3 iterations, report to owner
There are no exceptions. A 10-second task also gets reviewed — review of a 10-second task takes 10 seconds. The only exception is when the task IS itself a meta-review action

examples.situation: Engineer Manager implements a small CSS fix directly (micro-task exception)
examples.right: Fire sub-invocation in review mode with the diff. Reviewer checks for regressions, wrong selectors, unintended side effects

examples.situation: Reviewer reads the executor's reasoning and agrees with the approach
examples.wrong: Approve based on understanding the reasoning
examples.right: Should never see the reasoning. Review the artifacts on their merit — if context isolation is broken, the review is compromised

anti_patterns: Skipping review because the task is simple — that's exactly where bugs slip through
Giving the reviewer access to the execution reasoning — breaks isolation, reintroduces confirmation bias
Praising in the review — if it's ok, say 'approved' and stop
Listing vague problems instead of specific file:line references
content.responsibility: All executing agents. Each Manager extends the adversarial review template with discipline-specific criteria.
